summary: Frontend Testing Complete - GoalsSection component integration into investments.tsx verified. All Investments screen sections render correctly including the extracted GoalsSection component. Market data shows live prices, Portfolio Overview shows investment tracking, and the Financial Goals section renders properly.

frontend_issues.notes: GoalsSection component successfully integrated into investments.tsx. File reduced from 1968 to 1916 lines (~2.6% reduction). All investment tracking features working correctly.

investments.tsx maintains full functionality after component extraction

context_for_next_testing_agent: GoalsSection component extraction verified. investments.tsx imports { MarketTickerBar, GoalsSection } from components/investments. All sections render correctly: Indian Markets (live prices for Nifty 50, SENSEX, Nifty Bank, Gold, Silver), Portfolio Overview (showing ₹43,000 invested, ₹53,472.92 current value, +24.36% gain), My Holdings (with Clear, CAS, Add buttons), Asset Allocation (pie chart), Risk Profile & Strategy (Moderate 2.6/5), Recurring Investments (SIPs), and Financial Goals (GoalsSection component).
